title: AMFI June Data: Mid-cap, small-cap funds beat flexi-cap inflows for the first time in 30 months. Here's why
summary: Retail investors pumped more money into mid-cap and small-cap funds than flexi-cap funds in June for the first time since Dec 2023. Experts say improving earnings visibility, stronger returns and attractive valuations drove the shift, while cautioning against reading too much into one month's data.

title: Health insurance checklist: Key policy terms to watch out for before hospital admission
summary: Many policyholders get nasty surprises during hospitalisation. This is mainly due to several limitations buried in the policy terms and conditions, resulting in high out-of-pocket expenses.

title: Wealth management for new parents: Expert explains 5 money moves to secure your child's future
summary: New parents can strengthen their child's financial future through term insurance, health cover, emergency savings and SIP investments. Early investing helps build a ₹1.2 crore education corpus while protecting the family from unexpected financial risks and rising education costs.

title: Lost track of an old PF account? EPFO's new Service History feature can help, here's how
summary: EPFO's new Service History feature lets members view their complete employment and PF records in one place. The update can help subscribers identify missing service records and trace old PF accounts before filing claims.

title: Govt’s hub-and-spoke model for international travel: How will it help airline passengers?
summary: The government’s hub-and-spoke model will allow airline passengers to check in baggage and complete customs and immigration formalities at spoke city airport (Tier-II and -III cities), and take onward flight from the hub city airport (Delhi or other major cities) to international locations.

title: Bank holiday today? Check if SBI, HDFC, ICICI are closed on 11 July for second Saturday off — RBI calendar here
summary: Public and private banks across India will remain closed today, 11 July, for the second Saturday holiday. Bank operations will remain suspended nationwide, but online banking services will remain accessible for transactions.

title: Why a same-sex couple is challenging the income tax law that exempts gifts only between spouses? Explained
summary: The Karnataka High Court has requested the Union government to respond to a petition challenging tax exemptions for gifts between spouses, which currently excludes same-sex couples. Details here.

title: EPS 2026: New withdrawal rules and 20-day claim settlement explained
summary: With EPS 2026, the pension system for organized sector employees is reformed for transparency and efficiency. It mandates a 36-month wait for withdrawal benefits, enforces a 20-day claim processing deadline, and supports higher pensions, while preserving existing benefits for current members.
